Asserts that a value is a workspace proposal data only.

## Import

```ts
import { assertWorkspaceProposalDataOnly } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Signature

```ts
function assertWorkspaceProposalDataOnly(
	value: unknown,
	label = "value",
): void
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |
| `label` | `unknown` | label value used by the helper. |

## Returns

The narrowed, validated value.

## Example

```ts
import { assertWorkspaceProposalDataOnly } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item/scheduling";
```
